description: The image displays a simplified land cover map featuring a large, irregularly shaped green polygon centrally labelled "2110", indicating a specific land cover class. This green area is surrounded by a light beige or light yellow background, representing other unclassified or different land cover types. The label "2110" corresponds to the CORINE Land Cover (CLC) class "Non-irrigated arable land". No scale bar, legend, geographic context, or reference year is visible.
